pages.zh: 越来越奇怪！越来越奇怪！爱丽丝叫道。
pages.enRich: {g|Curiouser} and {g|curiouser}! {b|cried} {g|Alice}.

pages.zh: 她太惊讶了，一时间忘了怎么说正确的英语。
pages.enRich: {g|She} was so surprised that {g|she} {b|forgot} how to {b|speak} good {g|English} for {g|a moment}.

pages.zh: 现在我像有史以来最大的望远镜一样张开了！
pages.enRich: Now {g|I} ’m {b|opening} out like {g|the largest telescope} that ever was!

pages.zh: 再见，脚！爱丽丝说。
pages.enRich: Good-bye, {g|feet}! {b|said} {g|Alice}.

pages.zh: 她的脚看起来离得很远。
pages.enRich: {g|Her feet} seemed very far away when {g|she} {b|looked} down.

pages.zh: 哦，我可怜的小脚，我想知道现在谁会帮你们穿鞋和袜子。
pages.enRich: Oh, {g|my poor little feet}, {g|I} {b|wonder} who will {b|put} on {g|your shoes and stockings} now.

pages.zh: 我会离得太远，没法为你们操心了。
pages.enRich: {g|I} shall be too far off to {b|trouble} {g|myself} about {g|you}.

pages.zh: 你们得自己想最好的办法。
pages.enRich: {g|You} must {b|manage} {g|the best way} {g|you} can.

pages.zh: 但我必须对它们好一点，爱丽丝想。
pages.enRich: But {g|I} must be kind to {g|them}, {b|thought} {g|Alice}.

pages.zh: 或者它们不会按我想走的路走。
pages.enRich: Or perhaps {g|they} won’t {b|walk} {g|the way} {g|I} want to {b|go}.

pages.zh: 让我想想：我每年圣诞节给它们一双新靴子。
pages.enRich: Let {g|me} {b|see}: {g|I} ’ll {b|give} {g|them} {g|a new pair} of {g|boots} every {g|Christmas}.

pages.zh: 她坐下来，又开始哭了。
pages.enRich: {g|She} {b|sat} down and {b|began} to {b|cry} again.

pages.zh: 你应该为自己感到羞耻，爱丽丝对自己说。
pages.enRich: {g|You} ought to be ashamed of {g|yourself}, {b|said} {g|Alice} to {g|herself}.

pages.zh: 像你这么大的女孩不应该这样哭。
pages.enRich: {g|A great girl} like {g|you} should not {b|cry} like this.

pages.zh: 马上停下来，我告诉你！
pages.enRich: {b|Stop} this moment, {g|I} {b|tell} {g|you}!

pages.zh: 她继续哭个不停，眼泪流成了一个大池子。
pages.enRich: But {g|she} {b|went} on all the same, and {b|shed} gallons of {g|tears}, until there was {g|a large pool} all round {g|her}.

pages.zh: 她掉进了自己哭出来的眼泪池里。
pages.enRich: {g|She} {b|found} herself in {g|the pool of tears} which {g|she} {b|had wept} when {g|she} was nine feet high.

pages.zh: 她开始游泳，想找出口。
pages.enRich: {g|She} {b|swam} about, trying to {b|find} {g|the way} out.

pages.zh: 她看到一只老鼠也在池子里游泳。
pages.enRich: {g|She} {b|saw} {g|a Mouse} swimming in {g|the pool} too.

pages.zh: 哦，老鼠先生，你知道怎么出去吗？爱丽丝问。
pages.enRich: O {g|Mouse}, do {g|you} {b|know} {g|the way} out of {g|this pool}? {b|asked} {g|Alice}.
